'''zhajama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yokefellow|yokefellow]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yokefellow|yokefellow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhajama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæjæmæth|zhæjæmæth]] || [[word:zhæjæmæj|zhæjæmæj]] || [[word:zhæjæmæsh|zhæjæmæsh]] || [[word:zhæjæmæ|zhæjæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhajajamath|zhajajamath]] || [[word:zhajajamaj|zhajajamaj]] || [[word:zhajajamash|zhajajamash]] || [[word:zhajajama|zhajajama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhajamath|zhajamath]] || [[word:zhajamaj|zhajamaj]] || [[word:zhajamash|zhajamash]] || [[word:zhajama|zhajama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhajafmath|zhajafmath]] || [[word:zhajafmaj|zhajafmaj]] || [[word:zhajafmash|zhajafmash]] || [[word:zhajafmaf|zhajafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhajamatha|zhajamatha]] || [[word:zhajamaja|zhajamaja]] || [[word:zhajamasha|zhajamasha]] || [[word:zhajamaka|zhajamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhajamath|zhajamath]] || [[word:zhajamaj|zhajamaj]] || [[word:zhajamash|zhajamash]] || [[word:zhajama|zhajama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhajamathal|zhajamathal]] || [[word:zhajamajal|zhajamajal]] || [[word:zhajamashal|zhajamashal]] || [[word:zhajamakal|zhajamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhajamathatha|zhajamathatha]] || [[word:zhajamajaja|zhajamajaja]] || [[word:zhajamashasha|zhajamashasha]] || [[word:zhajamaka|zhajamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhajamathan|zhajamathan]] || [[word:zhajamajan|zhajamajan]] || [[word:zhajamashan|zhajamashan]] || [[word:zhajamakan|zhajamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhajamathaoro|zhajamathaoro]] || [[word:zhajamajaoro|zhajamajaoro]] || [[word:zhajamashaoro|zhajamashaoro]] || [[word:zhajamakaoro|zhajamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
